entities.name: AGRICULTURAL STATISTICS
entities.description: Statistics that correspond to ground situations and determine the actual extent of crops and farming practices

entities.name: CROP
entities.description: Agricultural plants whose extent is determined by statistics

entities.name: CULTIVATION
entities.description: The process of preparing land and growing crops

entities.name: FARMING PRACTICES
entities.description: General methods and techniques used in agricultural production

entities.name: GEOGRAPHICAL DATA
entities.description: Reliable, retraceable, and climate-independent data used in agricultural statistics

entities.name: AGROCLIMATIC REGIONS
entities.description: Different regions characterized by climate and soil where geographical data is applied

entities.name: GEO-STAMPING APPROACH
entities.description: An integration of remote sensing, GPS, and GIS for tracking workflow and enabling plot-level inventory

entities.name: REMOTE SENSING
entities.description: A technology used to acquire information from a distance, integrated into the geo-stamping approach

entities.name: GPS
entities.description: Global Positioning System used for location tracking within the geo-stamping approach

entities.name: GIS
entities.description: Geographic Information System used for mapping and analysis within the geo-stamping approach

entities.name: PLOT-LEVEL INVENTORY
entities.description: The detailed inventory of crops at the plot level enabled by the geo-stamping approach

entities.name: GPS-BASED SMARTPHONES
entities.description: Instruments used to capture actual ground situations and provide data authenticity
